name: Client / Customer / The Society
description: The client is an anonymous financial services organization facing strict regulatory obligations related to money laundering and financial crime prevention. The organization requires robust data collection, verification, and remediation processes to maintain compliance across multiple customer touchpoints and legacy systems.
context: Client requested for a strategic automation process through which customer data is regularly updated...
The Society entered into an agreement with Mitek systems to use their Verified Identity Platform...
The Customer Due Diligence (CDD) Remediation programme is designed to ensure compliance with Money Laundering Regulations (MLReg) obligations.

name: SKYC (Smart KYC) project
description: A strategic case management lifecycle programme designed to support continuous Customer Due Diligence (CDD) and Identity Verification (ID&V) processes. The solution provides flexibility to integrate within broader monitoring frameworks and establishes a structured automation workflow for regulatory data updates.
context: IBM worked with Client to set up a strategic case management lifecycle as part of the SKYC (Smart KYC) project...
support an enduring CDD and ID&V journey, with flexibility to embed within the Event Based Monitoring (EBM) framework.

name: Customer Due Diligence (CDD) Remediation programme
description: A dedicated remediation initiative focused on collecting missing customer data and verifying the accuracy of existing records. The programme addresses compliance gaps by establishing systematic workflows for data collection, validation, and periodic refreshes across digital and mediated channels.
context: The Customer Due Diligence (CDD) Remediation programme is designed to ensure compliance with Money Laundering Regulations (MLReg) obligations.
It involves collecting missing CDD information and verifying that existing data is accurate and up-to-date.

name: ID&V solution
description: An automated identity verification and remediation system that processes customer ID cases through automated data validation workflows. The solution routes successful validations directly to core systems while managing exceptions through manual remediation tools for operational review.
context: The ID&V project involved enhancement of client ID&V solution to use an automated process to directly upload Customer ID cases...
Any records which did not pass the data validation were sent to the exceptional workflow tool for subsequent manual updation...

name: AML Remediation capability
description: A comprehensive compliance framework targeting Business Savings customers to address legacy regulatory gaps. The capability ensures full adherence to Financial Crime Minimum Control Standards through systematic data collection and verification of missing CDD and ID&V documentation.
context: The objective of this project was to establish a comprehensive and sustainable AML Remediation capability for Business Savings customers...
ensured full compliance with the Financial Crime Minimum Control Standards and the latest policy guidance.

name: Pega workflow management tool
description: A dedicated workflow automation platform created to manage Customer Due Diligence and Identity Verification processes. The tool standardizes case management workflows and supports the strategic automation lifecycle required for regulatory compliance.
context: As part of the project a Pega workflow management tool is being created to handle CDD and ID&V workflow.

name: DocuSign solution
description: A frictionless digital signature and data collection platform deployed to enhance customer engagement and compliance. The solution provides an alternative channel for digitally inactive members to submit CDD information without relying on traditional branch or telephony services.
context: IBM is helping client build a new, reliable, and frictionless DocuSign solution on .co.uk.
This alternative channel will allow client digitally inactive members to submit their CDD information without needing to visit a branch...

name: ePaaS solution
description: A fully automated integration and processing platform operating continuously to validate and route customer data. The system handles both successful data passes and failure notifications, ensuring seamless connectivity between identity providers and core systems.
context: From Data Validations, the process moves to the ePaaS solution, which is noted as Fully automated (runs 24*7).
The overall flow describes the journey from Mitek through Data Validations and the ePaaS solution...

name: SAMM application
description: A specialized operational application used by the Remediation Operations team to manually update customer records. The system serves as a backend repository for exception handling and manual data correction workflows.
context: Any records which did not pass the data validation were sent to the exceptional workflow tool for subsequent manual updation by the Remediation Operation team through the SAMM application.
EWT is shown to send a failure/notification path to SAMM.

name: Exception Workflow Tool (EWT)
description: A dedicated exception management platform that routes failed data validations to operational teams for manual review. The tool ensures that non-compliant or invalid records are captured and processed through a structured remediation workflow.
context: BIP failures come via DSA to EWT.
If the process Fails at the ePaaS solution, it proceeds to EWT, which is contained within the RemOps section...
